title: potentilla astracanica f. parviflora
intro: Potentilla astracanica f. parviflora, also known as Dwarf Five-leafed Potentilla, is a flowering plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Potentilla astracanica f. parviflora include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
